title: rootless podman fails after creating storage.conf - run root overridden
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

In order to change podman's storage location from `~/.local/share/containers/storage` to `/mnt/podman-storage`, I created the following `~/.config/containers/storage.conf` (the directory didn't exist before), which I edited from `/etc/containers/storage.conf`:
```
[storage]
driver = "overlay"
runroot = "/var/run/user/1000" # "/var/run/containers/storage"
graphroot = "/mnt/podman-storage" # "/var/lib/containers/storage"
rootless_storage_path = "/mnt/podman-storage" # "$HOME/.local/share/containers/storage"
[storage.options]
additionalimagestores = [
]
[storage.options.overlay]
mountopt = "nodev,metacopy=on"
[storage.options.thinpool]
```
Now podman fails with:
```
Error: mkdir /var/run/containers/storage: permission denied
```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `sudo mkdir /mnt/podman-storage && sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) /mnt/podman-storage && chmod -R 700 /mnt/podman-storage`

2. Create the storage configuration above under `~/.config/containers/storage.conf`

3. Run `podman info` or `podman version`.


**Output of `podman version`:**

```
$ sudo podman version
Version:      2.0.4
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.14.6
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

Why's run root being overridden: `Overriding run root "/var/run/user/1000" with "/var/run/containers/storage" from database`?


```
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug          
DEBU[0000] Called info.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=debug info) 
DEBU[0000] Ignoring libpod.conf EventsLogger setting "/home/user/.config/containers/containers.conf". Use "journald" if you want to change this setting and remove libpod.conf files. 
DEBU[0000] Reading configuration file "/usr/share/containers/containers.conf" 
DEBU[0000] Merged system config "/usr/share/containers/containers.conf": &{{[] [] containers-default-0.14.6 [] private enabled [CAP_AUDIT_WRITE CAP_CHOWN CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE CAP_FOWNER CAP_FSETID CAP_KILL CAP_MKNOD CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE CAP_NET_RAW CAP_SETFCAP CAP_SETGID CAP_SETPCAP CAP_SETUID CAP_SYS_CHROOT] [] []  [] [] [] true [PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin] false false false  private k8s-file -1 slirp4netns false 2048 private /usr/share/containers/seccomp.json 65536k private host 65536} {true systemd [PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin] [/usr/libexec/podman/conmon /usr/local/libexec/podman/conmon /usr/local/lib/podman/conmon /usr/bin/conmon /usr/sbin/conmon /usr/local/bin/conmon /usr/local/sbin/conmon /run/current-system/sw/bin/conmon] ctrl-p,ctrl-q true /run/user/1000/libpod/tmp/events/events.log file [/usr/share/containers/oci/hooks.d] docker:// /pause k8s.gcr.io/pause:3.2 /usr/libexec/podman/catatonit shm   false 2048 /usr/local/bin/crun map[crun:[/usr/bin/crun /usr/sbin/crun /usr/local/bin/crun /usr/local/sbin/crun /sbin/crun /bin/crun /run/current-system/sw/bin/crun] kata:[/usr/bin/kata-runtime /usr/sbin/kata-runtime /usr/local/bin/kata-runtime /usr/local/sbin/kata-runtime /sbin/kata-runtime /bin/kata-runtime /usr/bin/kata-qemu /usr/bin/kata-fc] runc:[/usr/bin/runc /usr/sbin/runc /usr/local/bin/runc /usr/local/sbin/runc /sbin/runc /bin/runc /usr/lib/cri-o-runc/sbin/runc /run/current-system/sw/bin/runc]] missing false   [] [crun runc] [crun] [kata kata-runtime kata-qemu kata-fc] {false false false false false false} /etc/containers/policy.json false 3 /mnt/podman-storage/libpod 10 /run/user/1000/libpod/tmp /mnt/podman-storage/volumes} {[/usr/libexec/cni /usr/lib/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] podman /etc/cni/net.d/}} 
DEBU[0000] Using conmon: "/usr/bin/conmon"              
DEBU[0000] Initializing boltdb state at /mnt/podman-storage/libpod/bolt_state.db 
DEBU[0000] Overriding run root "/var/run/user/1000" with "/var/run/containers/storage" from database 
DEBU[0000] Using graph driver overlay                   
DEBU[0000] Using graph root /mnt/podman-storage         
DEBU[0000] Using run root /var/run/containers/storage   
DEBU[0000] Using static dir /mnt/podman-storage/libpod  
DEBU[0000] Using tmp dir /run/user/1000/libpod/tmp      
DEBU[0000] Using volume path /mnt/podman-storage/volumes 
DEBU[0000] Set libpod namespace to ""                   
Error: mkdir /var/run/containers/storage: permission denied
```

**Output of `podman info --debug` without `~/.config/containers/storage.conf`**:

Strangely, it says it's using `configFile: /home/user/.config/containers/storage.conf` even though it doesn't exist.

```
$ podman --log-level=debug info
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
podman-2.0.4-1.fc32.x86_64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes

comments.body:
Could you make sure there is no podman currently running in your user session?

You will also need the following in your homedir storage.conf

mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
Yes, I tried on a fresh VM and it worked correctly (with the addition of mount_program). So I deleted all podman related folders, re-installed it, and it seems to be fixed. Thank you!
